mapper.select: SELECT /* getAlimTemp */ ALIM_SITU , TEMP_CODE , TEMP_TITL , ALIM_TITL , TEMP_CONT , LINK_URLX , USEE_YSNO FROM TB_ALTEMP WHERE ALIM_SITU = #{alimSitu} AND TEMP_CODE = #{tempCode} AND USEE_YSNO = #{commYes}

SELECT /* getMyAlimList */ USER_NUMB , ALIM_NUMB , ALIM_SITU , TEMP_CODE , ALIM_TITL , ALIM_CONT , LINK_URLX , READ_YSNO , READ_DATE , SEND_DATE , DELT_YSNO , ALIM_ICON_CODE , ALIM_ICON_NAME FROM ( SELECT USER_NUMB , ALIM_NUMB , ALIM_SITU , TEMP_CODE , ALIM_TITL , ALIM_CONT , LINK_URLX , READ_YSNO , TO_CHAR(READ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS READ_DATE , TO_CHAR(SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DATE , DELT_YSNO , ALIM_ICON_CODE , ALIM_ICON_NAME , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SEND_DATE DESC, ALIM_NUMB DESC) AS ROW_NUMB FROM ( SELECT A.USER_NUMB , A.ALIM_NUMB , A.ALIM_SITU , A.TEMP_CODE , A.ALIM_TITL , A.ALIM_CONT , A.LINK_URLX , A.READ_YSNO , A.READ_DATE , A.SEND_DATE , A.DELT_YSNO , C.OPT1_CODE AS ALIM_ICON_CODE , C.OPT1_NAME AS ALIM_ICON_NAME FROM TB_ALIMXX A LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD C ON C.COMM_CODE = #{codeAlimSitu} AND C.COMD_CODE = A.ALIM_SITU AND C.OPT1_CODE = '1' AND NVL(C.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND NVL(A.DELT_YSNO, #{commNo}) = #{commNo} ) ) WHERE ROW_NUMB BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY ROW_NUMB
